summary: Photo Game functionality testing completed. Backend APIs working correctly with updated game config ($7M starting with advantage, $2M advantage bonus, 10s timeout). Frontend UI loads and all game flows (Bot Battle, Browse Games, Photo Selection) are functional. No 'Failed to join game' error observed during testing.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for test photo images (data issue, not code issue)

issues: React hydration warning: nested <button> elements in LikeButton component inside PhotoCard - may cause hydration errors

action_items: Monitor for 'Failed to join game' errors in production logs - enhanced logging added in server.py and pvp_game_websocket.py should help diagnose any future occurrences
Optional: Fix nested button hydration warning in PhotoCard/LikeButton component
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket join handler in server.py (lines 3084-3124) has good error logging added for connect_player failures
Room auto-creation logic (lines 3092-3102) handles late joiners well
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo game API and UI working correctly. Game config values verified: advantage_bonus=2M, max_bid=7M, starting_bankroll_with_advantage=7M, choice_timeout=10s. Bot Battle flow tested successfully. 'Failed to join game' error not reproducible during testing - may be a network/timing issue. Enhanced logging has been added to backend for debugging future occurrences.
